2 | Funnel University
Page 1: Double Your Reading Sales Page
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 2 of 16 --

Issue 2 | 3
By Russell Brunson, the Overnight Success Maker
Welcome back to Funnel University! This month, we're
breaking down a couple of really cool funnels. The first one
I want to talk about is a funnel that we recently promoted,
called Double Your Reading.
Every January we do a live event with Howard Berg, the
world's fastest reader, to help people double their reading
speed. I think this is the third year we've done this with
Howard because he's awesome and I think everyone should
learn how to double their reading.
The concept behind this funnel is something I don't see a lot
of people doing so I wanted to show you behind the scenes
of how it works.
You Only Pay If...
The original concept behind this is something we call the
Invisible Funnel. Back in the day I was working for a guy named
Chet Holmes. He would get people to come onto a three-hour
webinar, and at the end he'd sell them a $5,000 package.
The way he structured that webinar was really cool. He'd ask
people to give him their credit card, but they didn't have to
pay anything right away. Instead, he'd let people watch the
full three hour webinar first, and if they loved it, they would
pay (I think it was $297). If they didn't think it was worth
$297, then they didn't pay anything.
It would be like going to a restaurant, eating all the food,
then paying for the meal
only if you loved it. Or like sitting
through a whole movie at a theater and
only paying if it was
worth the $10 admission fee. That's how Chet did
everything.
One day I showed Chet's model to a close friend, Daegan
Smith, who then took that concept and figured out a way to
replicate it online. A few days later, he launched the very first
ever Invisible Funnel online and he
crushed it!
After that I launched my own Invisible Funnel online and
we've been using it in tons of different markets since then.
Now my goal is to share this concept with more people
because it works
really well.
A Tangible Result
The key to the Invisible Funnel is to deliver a
tangible result
to your audience. For example, with Double Your Reading,
Howard helps you to double the amount of words you can
read per minute during a four hour training session. So you
sign up, put your credit card number in and go through the
entire training.
After the training is over, you pay
if and only if you double
your reading speed. If you don't, you let us know and we
won't bill you anything.
Let me walk you through the process of how we get people
to sign up for the training...
Page One: Sales Page
First, the headline talks about the big result (shown in the
screenshot on the left). The big result is double your reading,
or you don't pay anything. That's it. Pretty simple. There's a
video that follows the script that I use for my Invisible Funnel
sales videos. I shared the same script in section four of my
book,
DotCom Secrets if you want to use it.
Below the video, I like to have the terms written out because
I don't want people to get confused and refund. It covers
three steps for the customer:
• 	Step 1: Enter your credit card to reserve your spot.
• 	Step 2: Attend the workshop.
• 	Step 3: After the workshop, if you haven't doubled your
reading, let us know and you won't pay a dime. If you
did double your reading, we'll bill you just $100.
The second year we ran this promotion, we added a little
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 3 of 16 --

4 | Funnel University
Order Block with option to prepay
The Numbers
People who prepaid
70-80%
Upsell Conv rate
18%
tweak. If you scroll down the page we added the option to
prepay and save $20. You can see how we worded this in the
screenshot above.
What was interesting, is that
between 70% and 80% of
people took the prepay option, which was amazing, because
we ended up making a ton of money up front on what is
basically a free offer!
Page 2: The Upsell
Next, Howard has a whole bunch of other products and
services - so we took all of his best stuff and bundled it
together in one upsell. We offer his 12-week course for $197.
If they say yes, it adds it to the order. I think the conversion
on that was upwards of 18%, which is
amazing!
Page 3: Member's Area
After the upsell, they go to the member’s area. In the
member’s area we show people how the training works and
post all the handouts ahead of time. We also post the replay,
so if you want to go back and funnel hack and buy it, you'll
get to see the actual replay of the webinar here.
In the past, we had people register and then sent them
straight to the webinar with Howard. So the member's area
can be really simple, but we added some extra resources to
help people get the best results.
That's the whole Invisible Funnel! It’s a really simple
concept - it's basically three pages. Step one is the sales
page, step two is the upsell page, and step three is the
members area.
For Other Markets
We've used the Invisible Funnels in several markets already.
In the dating market,the concept was "Come on our webinar
and we'll teach you how to get a girlfriend this weekend. If
you don't get a girlfriend by Monday, we won't bill you."
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 4 of 16 --

Issue 2 | 5
Page 2: Double Your Reading Upsell
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

6 | Funnel University
Page 3: Double Your Reading Member’s Area
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 6 of 16 --

Issue 2 | 7
In the couponing industry we showed people how to save a
bunch of money on groceries.
We've done it in weight loss, we've done it in juicing, and
a ton of other markets. But in every market, it all ties in to
having a result you can deliver during a live training session.
Tips for using the invisible funnel
So there are a few key things to remember when you're
using the Invisible Funnel. First, post the rules on the sales
page so your audience understands how they'll be billed.
Second, in the order block, include the option to pay nothing
up front, or to prepay at a discount. From there, take them to
a very simple upsell.
The member's area is where you actually deliver the webinar.
This is where you deliver the result. And that's it - that's what
the invisible funnel looks like.
There are a couple of things that we didn't do with Howard's
invisible funnel that you could do. A lot of times we'll have
85% to 90% of registrants show up on these webinars and
people stay for the full four hours. The best time to sell
something is after they got an amazing result and you have
the next thing they need. Offering your high ticket programs
at the end of an Invisible Funnel webinar is an amazing idea.
We didn't do this for Double Your Reading just because
Howard doesn't have a high ticket program. But if you do,
this is a really good place to sell it.
Also, we don't typically drive a lot of cold traffic to these
webinars. Usually it's something we promote to our list,
which does a couple of things:
1. 	It gives you a cool way to monetize your list. It gives
them a cool experience and they have a chance to spend
three or four hours building an amazing bond with you.
2. 	You're giving people an exciting result, you make some
money, and it becomes a really fun, cool thing.
That is an invisible funnel. Now you have no excuses if
you've been on the fence about this type of funnel. It works
amazing and is one of the best funnels you can use!
The Invisible Funnel
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 7 of 16 --

-- 8 of 16 --

Issue 2 | 9
By Russell Brunson, the Overnight Success Maker
The next funnel we're going to be talking about is one of
my favorites! It's the funnel that Garrett White created to sell
Warrior Week. If you've been in my community at all, you
probably know a little bit about Garrett. He spoke at the first
Funnel Hacking Live event in 2015 and he'll be speaking
again this year.
I didn't even know who Garrett was until we were about
eight months into ClickFunnels. We got a support ticket from
some guy saying how much he loved ClickFunnels and after
shifting all his stuff over, he was making about $500,000 every
month. The support guy told me, "Hey, this guy's making half
a million bucks a month. You should check him out."
So I went to his website, watched the first video and was
immediately sucked in. I went to the next page that has
a huge documentary and I got sucked in again! I was so
excited about what Garrett was doing, I called him the next
day and invited him to speak at our event.
Pushing People Out
There are a couple cool things about Garrett’s funnel he
talked about at our event that I want to share with you today.
The first concept is one we all need to be thinking about. A
lot of times we try to create funnels that are going to appeal
to everyone, whereas Garrett's funnel does the
opposite. It's
all about
pushing people away so you only get the core few
people that you
do want - your dream clients.
Some people who watch his videos might be offended. He
drops the f-bomb a lot. He says things that immediately cut
out women and certain types of men - but that's how he
finds the people he wants.
Since I first met Garrett, he's taken this funnel and blown it
up to the point where it's doing some amazing numbers.
Now he's transitioning his model but the core concepts
behind it are amazing, so I want to walk you through it...
Page One: Landing Page
It all begins with his landing page. Notice how it calls out
to his dream clients - married businessmen. It’s not just
any businessmen, they need to be married. Then there is a
very intense video of him telling his story and getting you
engaged so you’ll want to figure out what in the world he's
talking about.
What's interesting is you see tons of squeeze pages that offer
a free ebook, free report or free email newsletter because
that's what every marketer is doing. But at our event, Garrett
talked about how when he asked himself what he would
want, he'd like to watch a cool documentary or movie.
A lot of times it's easy to ask, "What are other internet
marketers doing?" But the more important question is what
would your dream customer want? What would get them
engaged enough to actually give you their email address?
For Garrett, it's his documentaries. That's his big pitch.
Opt in and you're going to get to watch a cool, 60 minute
documentary about Warrior Week - so you do opt in and it
takes you to the next page...
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 9 of 16 --

10 | Funnel University
Page 1: Warrior Week Landing Page
Page Two: Documentary
Now, you may wonder who's going to watch a 60 minute
documentary, because it's pretty long. But the content is
amazing. Garrett talks about Warrior Week and you've got him
and a bunch of other guys crying - it's intense and powerful.
On long videos like this, we like to use something we call a
video spoiler box. In the screenshot on page 11, you can see
where he does something similar under the “Click Here to
Apply...” button. He breaks down what's going to happen in
the documentary so that way you're not wondering where
things are going. You know that first it's going to talk about
Council of Kings, then Why Warrior Week, Divine Darkness,
and so on. It helps keep you intrigued so you say to yourself,
"Man, I've got to watch to the 27 minute mark, because I'm
going to find out about Warrior Week." It's funny, if you look
at the video, it's actually about 121 minutes long, so it's two
hours instead of just the one hour. But he's bringing you in
and keeping you in.
Something interesting Garrett told me at the event is that the
average person watches this documentary four times before
they apply to become a part of Warrior Week! So people are
spending eight hours or more watching this process before
they are willing to take the leap. This funnel is not about
getting a quick conversion - it's about creating desire for
something that people want to be part of.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 10 of 16 --

Issue 2 | 11
Page 2: Warrior Week Documentary
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 11 of 16 --

12 | Funnel University
Page 3: Warrior Week Application
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 12 of 16 --

Issue 2 | 13
Through the email sequences and everything else that's
happening, Garrett is building a culture and a community
that the people he's calling out (married businessmen)
will want to be part of. I think it's brilliant. Building a
documentary about what we do is something I’ve never
done, but really want to.
Page Three: Application
After you watch the documentary, and you finally decide to
sign up, you click a button to apply for Warrior Week. This
takes you to a page with a very personal video from Garrett
to you. The documentary has mass appeal, but this video
focuses more on the individual. He's saying, "Welcome, I'm
glad you're here. There could potentially be a spot for you
but you need to apply." Because he's trying to cut people
out, the very first step in the application form asks if you are a
man or a woman. If you're a woman, it kicks you out because
he's only working with married businessmen, right?
He goes through this whole application process to figure
out if you're worthy and if you're going to be the right fit for
them. It's all about positioning and posturing, which is the
key with any kind of high ticket sales.
Page Four: Indoctrination
After you apply for Warrior Week, his next goal is
indoctrination. As if you haven't been indoctrinated through
the documentary already, but now he wants you to be
consumed, to learn and to go through the steps so that
when you do pick up the phone, you're ready to buy.
So the next step takes you to a page where you're directed
Page 4: Warrior Week Indoctrination
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 13 of 16 --

14 | Funnel University
to watch a video, schedule an interview with Sam, and then
unlock your private quarters. In there, Garrett's provided
hours and hours of training. All of it is completely free with
the goal of indoctrinating you and making you want to be
part of this community.
Warrior Week
Warrior Week takes people through a four day process, they
have an amazing experience, and then at the end of that he
pitches the audience on a $50,000 program. The last time
I talked to him, he had an average of about six out of eight
people signing up for the $50,000 program!
I want you to think through this process. How can you
create your product, your business, your experience and do
something similar? Do you have something that's experiential,
and if not, can you create something? Because when people
see that experience, they want to be part of it. People want to
belong, and that's really the power of this funnel.
I mapped out the process in the image above so you can
see the process simplified. The funnel begins with a squeeze
page that pitches the documentary. There is a video and
then people can opt in. I want to stress right here that you
have to sell at every single step. On this page, you're selling,
"Give me your email address and you can watch this amazing
documentary."
Garrett spends three or four minutes here selling you on
why you need to give him an email address and watch the
documentary. Notice the difference between that and, "Hey,
give me your email address and I'll send you a documentary."
He pitches this so that you've got desire. If you don't have
desire, you're not going to give him your email address, and
you're certainly not going to spend two hours watching a
documentary. So you are selling the desire at every single
step along the way.
The next page is the documentary. There is a button to
apply for Warrior Week and a video spoiler box talking about
what's happening at each step in the video and helping pull
them through the video.
After this you click on the apply button, which then takes
you to the personal video of Garrett speaking directly to you.
Then there is an application form that you fill out to see if
you're going to be a good fit.
After they apply, then they get taken to what I like to call the
indoctrination page. The first step on this page is to watch
the videos. The second step is to schedule a call with Sam.
And the third step is to watch the videos to indoctrinate you
Warrior Week
High Ticket Funnel
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 14 of 16 --

Issue 2 | 15
more into the concept that he's trying to sell throughout this
entire process. At the event he upsells an even higher ticket
product. And that is the Warrior Week funnel.
Your 5+ Figure Offers
This concept can fit for a lot of businesses. It doesn't mean
you have to run your own week long training programs,
but what do you sell that's experiential? Is it an event, is it a
seminar, is it a workshop, is it a mastermind? Then, how do
you capture that into a documentary form and what's the
next thing you can offer?
I remember during my very first mastermind program, I
told the group that I was selling a $5,000 program. They
asked, "What do you sell to people who pay $5,000?" At the
time, I didn't have anything else I was selling – that was my
backend. I realized from that meeting, that when you have
a $5,000 buyer, you need to sell them the next thing. I had
paid $25,000 to be in that mastermind group, and that night
they pitched us on a $30,000 package. It was crazy to me
when half of the room stood up and paid an extra $30k to be
a part of that.
Garrett has people pay $10,000 to go to Warrior Week, and
he pitches
another $50,000 thing there. Most people would
think, "That's not possible, no one's going to buy that." But if
you structure this funnel right by doing all these things we
talked about, it is possible. It's happening right now, and it
can happen in your business as well!
The Warrior Week high ticket funnel is one of my favorites,
and I hope you model this in your business too.

are based upon the current internet marketing environment. The
techniques presented have been extraordinarily lucrative and
rewarding. Because the internet is constantly changing, the sites
and services presented in this book may change, cease or expand
with time. We hope that the skills and knowledge acquired from
this course will provide you with the ability to adapt to inevitable
internet evolution. However, we cannot be held responsible for
changes that may affect the applicability of these techniques.

on our own testing and are only estimates of what we think you
could earn. There is no assurance you will do as well as stated in any
examples. If you rely upon any figures provided, you must accept
the entire risk of not doing as well as the information provided.
